3.error: T3 marker 0.9007 is implausible — it places the corner between T16 (0.8576) and T17 (0.9831), and the coordinate [-115.168115, 36.107953] sits on the Harmon Avenue straight at the end of the lap. T3 belongs in the opening sequence between T2 (0.0685) and T4 (0.1078); marker should be ~0.088 with a coordinate near [-115.1632, 36.1105]

7.error: scale 1 (hairpin) looks too severe — T7 is a slow-medium left in the Sphere wiggle, ~2 is more appropriate

13.error: scale 5 is slightly strong — this is a flat-out curvature of the Strip straight rather than a real corner; 6 (barely a deflection) fits better

15.error: scale 3 looks too severe — outline geometry through T15 is nearly straight; it is a fast right kink on exit of T14, scale ~5

16.error: scale 3 looks too severe — like T15 this is a flat kink onto the Harmon Avenue straight, scale ~5

gp.errors_summary: T3 has corrupt data: marker 0.9007 and coordinate place it on the Harmon Ave straight near the end of the lap instead of in the T2-T4 opening sequence (expected marker ~0.088). T7 severity overstated (not a hairpin), and T13/T15/T16 are flat kinks rather than scale 3-5 corners. Circuit has no official corner names; numbered names are correct.
